ops.body: Track A closed end to end (2026-07-19). Migration landed 07-17 (cookie-sync 32f127e1..; 0.15.0/0.16.0 released); authkit v0.2.0 released with the CallerCheck pin corrected to the shipped module-path identifier (com.github.yasyf.cookiesync — the bare 'cookiesync' pin never matched a real binary); live verification: cookiesync doctor 8/8 green on authkit 0.2.0 + one-tap 'cookiesync auth --browser chrome' → Authenticated chrome:Default, key cache Secure-Enclave wrapped. The full prime_auth→broker→ObtainKeys→vault-batch-retrieve path proven with no exit-4 caller rejection.
